message:
✨ Fix EPG mapping: load all channels, improve auto-mapper accuracy

- Manual mapping dialog now loads EPG channels from DB (was always empty)
- Auto-mapper uses ALL enabled EPG sources, not just first
- Auto-runs mapper when entering EPG Mappings screen if unmapped channels exist
- Fix fuzzy scorer: removed broken 0.6 floor that matched everything at 0%
- Smarter channel name cleaning: pipe-separated names use last segment
- Added contains-match strategy for better partial name matching
- Minimum fuzzy threshold raised to 0.55 (was effectively 0)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
